# Chiramel & Co

> Chiramel & Co is a law firm based in New Delhi, India. This file provides links to the public information and published legal commentary available on the firm's website.

## Firm Information

- [Home](https://chiramelco.com/): Official website homepage.
- [About Us](https://chiramelco.com/about/): Background and overview of the firm.
- [Our Team](https://chiramelco.com/team/): Advocate profiles and associate office presence.
- [Practice Areas](https://chiramelco.com/practice-areas/): Areas of legal practice.
- [Contact Us](https://chiramelco.com/contact/): Public contact information.

## Intellectual Property Practice

- [Intellectual Property Practice](https://chiramelco.com/intellectual-property/): Intellectual property, media, entertainment, technology and commercial services.
- [Trademarks](https://chiramelco.com/trademarks/)
- [Copyright](https://chiramelco.com/copyright/)
- [Media & Entertainment](https://chiramelco.com/media-entertainment/)
- [Commercial Transactions](https://chiramelco.com/commercial-transactions/)
- [Technology](https://chiramelco.com/technology/)
- [Patents & Designs](https://chiramelco.com/patents-designs/)

## News and Articles

- [News & Articles](https://chiramelco.com/news-articles/): Index of published legal commentary.
- [Territorial Jurisdiction of Consumer Commissions Under the Consumer Protection Act, 2019](https://chiramelco.com/news-articles/territorial-jurisdiction-consumer-commissions/) by Jos Chiramel.
- [Change in Law - Effect on Workers' Cess Implemented by States Later On](https://chiramelco.com/news-articles/change-in-law-workers-cess/) by Jos Chiramel.
- [Legality of Restriction on Period of Limitation](https://chiramelco.com/news-articles/restriction-on-period-of-limitation/) by Jos Chiramel.
- [Who Can Be an Arbitrator in a CPWD Dispute](https://chiramelco.com/news-articles/cpwd-arbitrator-eligibility/) by Jos Chiramel.

## Notice

The website materials are for general information only and do not constitute legal advice.
